---
title: "QMD"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: '{{{< iconify simple-icons:github >}}}'
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Qmdm
    - icon: "{{< iconify simple-icons:gitee >}}"
      text: Gitee
      href: https://gitee.com/qmdking
---

China Three Gorges University | Yichang, Hubei
Just fun!
